properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Even when I'm walking through the valley of dark shadows, Even when I'm overwhelmed beneath the weight of sorrow.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Even when I can't outrun my fears, And every other hope has disappeared, I'm not alone, I'm not alone.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I've still got Jesus, Oh I've still got Jesus, Closer than a brother No matter where I am.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When I need an ally in the fight, And need to know somebody's on my side, He always steps in, I've always got a friend.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You can take away all of thе things down here I treasurе, You can leave me nothing but the breath inside my lungs.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Still I know that I have everything, I can lift my empty hands and sing, At the end of the day With joy I can say:

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I've still got Jesus, Oh I've still got Jesus, Closer than a brother No matter where I am.

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: When I need an ally in the fight And need to know somebody's on my side He always steps in, I've always got a friend.

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Who's standing at the ready, When this life gets too heavy, He's there (He's there) He's there (He's there) He's there.

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Friend who stood right where I'm standing, So no matter what I'm handed, He's there, He's there, He's there.
